title: lathyrus maritimus var. pubescens
intro: Lathyrus maritimus var. pubescens, also known as the woolly sea pea or hairy sea pea, is a variety of annual legume native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. It is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions such as arthritis, wounds, and skin issues. The health benefits of Lathyrus maritimus var. pubescens include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, which can help to protect against infections. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being and promote recovery from illness.
